=== track_listing_text.txt
===================
===================
===================
Here is another Unwanted Man recording. Info follows: 

Bob Dylan
Niagara Falls, Ontario
Oakes Garden Theatre
August 23, 2003

Taper: Unwanted Man 
Source: Unknown generation audio disks > (Audio Catalyst) wav > (flacfrontend) flac. 

*********************************************
High Water ****REMOVED, Official release*****
*********************************************

Disc One (54:40)
1. Intro/Tombstone Blues(Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
2. Lay, Lady, Lay (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Tommy on electric guitar) 
3. Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
4. Make You Feel My Love (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on electric guitar) 
5. Dignity (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
6. Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
7. Shooting Star (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Tommy on electric guitar) 
8. Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine) (Bob on piano and harp) 
9. Cry A While (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar)

Disc Two (55:22)
1. Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on acoustic guitar) 
2. High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) ****REMOVED, Official release*****
3. Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar, Tommy on electric guitar) 
4. Forever Young (Bob on piano, Larry on acoustic guitar, Tommy and Freddie on electric guitars, 
   Tony on electric bass) 
5. Summer Days (Bob on piano, , Tony on standup bass, Tommy on electric guitar) 

(encore) 

6. Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano) 
7. All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on electric guitar) 

Band Members
Bob Dylan - piano, harp
Larry Campbell - guitar, slide guitar, pedal steel,
Freddie Koella - guitar
Tony Garnier - bass
George Recile - drums

Enjoy!
Charlespoet
